nasb.text: The night is almost gone, and the day is near. Therefore let us lay aside the deeds of darkness and put on the armor of light.

esv.text: The night is far gone; the day is at hand. So then let us cast off the works of darkness and put on the armor of light.

cnv.text: 黑夜已深，白晝近了，所以我們要除掉暗昧的行為，帶上光明的武器。

ccb.text: 黑夜已深，天将破晓，我们要除掉黑暗的行为，穿上光明的盔甲。

csbs.text: 黑夜已深，白昼近了。所以，我们要脱去黑暗的行为，配上光明的兵器。
